title: Harden Dynamic Resource Allocation in Your Cluster — Bind roles to explicit identities
text:
Create
ClusterRoleBinding
objects for each component identity, and avoid
sharing a broad role across unrelated DRA components.
Restrict
resourceclaims/driver
rules with
resourceNames
where possible so
an identity can only write status for the specific DRA driver it operates.

Verify each identity has only the required verbs and subresources.
Confirm DRA status updates work after rollout.
Watch API server audit events for denied
resourceclaims/binding
and
resourceclaims/driver
requests.
